Barcode.ProteinName: Brain abundant membrane attached signal protein 1
Complement C1q subcomponent subunit A_Complement C1q subcomponent subunit B_Complement C1q subcomponent subunit C
Tumor necrosis factor receptor superfamily member 27
Low affinity immunoglobulin gamma Fc region receptor II-a
Low affinity immunoglobulin gamma Fc region receptor II-b
N-terminal prohormone of brain natriuretic peptide
Platelet-activating factor acetylhydrolase IB subunit gamma
Tumor necrosis factor ligand superfamily member 14
Triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 1
Triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2

Threshold.name: Detectability_CSF
Threshold.explanation: Percentage of targets with reads above the Limit of Detection (LOD) (Minimum threshold = plasma-90%, serum-90%, csf-70%, other-0%)

Threshold.name: Detectability_OTHER
Threshold.explanation: Percentage of targets with reads above the Limit of Detection (LOD) (Minimum threshold = plasma-90%, serum-90%, csf-70%, other-0%)

Threshold.name: Detectability_PLASMA
Threshold.explanation: Percentage of targets with reads above the Limit of Detection (LOD) (Minimum threshold = plasma-90%, serum-90%, csf-70%, other-0%)

Threshold.name: Detectability_SERUM
Threshold.explanation: Percentage of targets with reads above the Limit of Detection (LOD) (Minimum threshold = plasma-90%, serum-90%, csf-70%, other-0%)

Threshold.name: ICReads
Threshold.explanation: Number of Internal Control (IC) reads within a sample (Minimum threshold = 1,000)

Threshold.name: IC_Median
Threshold.explanation: Sample IC reads relative to the median (Within +/- 40% of the plate median)

Threshold.name: NumReads
Threshold.explanation: Number of reads within a sample (Minimum threshold = 500,000)

Threshold.name: Detectability
Threshold.explanation: Percentage of targets that are detectable (target is considered detectable if > 50% of samples are above LOD) (Minimum threshold = 90%)

Threshold.name: ICRead_CV
Threshold.explanation: Coefficient of variation of internal control Parseable Matching reads across all wells (Maximum threshold = 25%)

Threshold.name: IPCRead_CV
Threshold.explanation: Coefficient of variation of Parseable Matching reads across all IPCs (Maximum threshold = 25%)

Threshold.name: IPCTarget_CV
Threshold.explanation: Median coefficient of variation of all IPC targets (Maximum threshold = 10%)

Threshold.name: MinReads
Threshold.explanation: Minimum number of Parseable Matching reads for the run (Minimum threshold = 100,000,000)
